examples: As a DDM creature, the Lamia is sort of weird.
The ideal position for a Lamia is near the main melee but not in the thick of it.
The Lamia is a little faster than the average creature, so getting away from her might be difficult.
"I think when people start to play with the drones, they feel pretty badass, " Lamia said.
Mr. Anthony later noticed his boss Mark Lamia reacting to the idea with concern.
